AreaDescription.en: Area will contain powerful beasts, which Einhar will help you hunt.
AreaDescription.zh: 该区域会出现强大的怪物，伊恩哈尔会助你狩猎。

AreaDescription.en: Area will contain Incursions to the Temple of Atzoatl, which Alva will open.
AreaDescription.zh: 该区域会出现阿佐亚特神庙的穿越间，阿尔瓦会帮你打开。

AreaDescription.en: Area will contain masses of Voltaxic Sulphite, which Niko will extract for you.
AreaDescription.zh: 该区域会出现大量魔暴亚硫酸，尼克会帮你提炼。

AreaDescription.en: Area will contain Immortal Syndicate activity, which Jun will help you combat.
AreaDescription.zh: 该区域会有不朽辛迪加活动，琼会助你一臂之力。
